text: Sanctioned Chinese Tanker Breaks U.S. Naval Blockade on Hormuz Sanctioned Chinese tanker Rich Starry transited the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday, carrying 250,000 barrels of methanol - the first known passage since the U.S. Naval blockade began. Beijing called the blockade dangerous & irresponsible. READ MORE

Trump: Meloni just says Italy doesn’t want to get involved. Even though Italy gets its oil from there, even though America is very important for Italy. She doesn’t think Italy should be involved. She thinks America should do the work for her. Source: Corriere
Trump on Meloni: She’s not the same person anymore, and Italy won’t be the same country. Immigration is killing Italy and all of Europe. Source: Corriere

Trump on the Hungarian elections: Viktor Orbán was a friend of mine. It wasn’t my election, but he was my friend, a good man. He did a good job on immigration. He didn’t let people come in and ruin his country like Italy did. Source: Corriere

Trump blasts Meloni: Does the Italian public like the fact that your prime minister isn’t giving us any help in getting the oil? Do people like it? I can’t imagine they do. I’m shocked by her. I thought she had courage—I was wrong. Source: Corriere
Trump: Iran would blow up Italy in two minutes if it had the chance. Source: Corriere

NEW: Turkish President Erdogan spoke by phone with Hungary’s PM-elect Péter Magyar, discussing bilateral ties and global issues. Erdogan said Türkiye–Hungary relations are strong and will grow further, highlighting NATO cooperation. He also congratulated Magyar on his election win.
Trump criticized Meloni after she condemned his remarks about Pope Leo XIV, saying: “She is the one who is unacceptable… she doesn’t care if Iran has a nuclear weapon.” Source: Corriere

Trump said he was “shocked” by Giorgia Meloni, claiming she refused to support the U.S. in its war with Iran. “I thought she had courage, but I was wrong.” Source: Corriere

Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Following reports of no ships departing Iranian reports, at least 2 ships that departed from Iranian ports transited the Strait of Hormuz, despite the U.S. blockade in the area. The report is based on data from Kpler, which tracks oil data in real time and analyzes vessel movement and commodity flows. One of the ships, sailing under a Liberian flag, crossed the strait after unloading corn at Iran’s Bandar Imam Khomeini port. The second vessel, which also transited the strait, was sailing under a Comoros flag. tweet

Status-6 (War & Military News) On Tuesday, Russian Air Force conducted airstrikes with FAB UMPK guided aerial bombs on the Pechenihy reservoir dam located in Ukraine's Kharkiv Oblast. BDA performed through a fiber-optic FPV drone. According to the head of Kharkiv Regional Military Administration, Oleh Syniehubov, the object was also targeted by Russian Molniya and Shahed drones, although these attacks are not seen in the footage. tweet
